dataQuality.warning: CRITICAL: Fewer than 8 labeled posts. Use labeledEngagement section ONLY for performance claims. Do NOT rank posts by nitterViews.
rules: labeledScore = likes + 3*RTs from x.com scrape — authoritative
nitterViews = view-ish stats — NEVER cite as likes or engagement
Do not recommend "more emoji" unless tied to a specific niche peer comparison

diagnosis: Only 5 posts have labeled likes — conclusions are directional, not statistical. Best labeled format: pick_with_proof (avg 6.5 likes, n=2). Top labeled post (12 score) opens: "Our highest conviction tier is the SUPER lock. We don't hand…" 1 labeled posts at 0 likes — mostly recaps/contextless replies. Niche winners in our lane use "sharp_public_board" structure — Dale rarely posts that shape.

structureRecipes.hook: Where the sharps/public are and more on Miami vs. Ole Miss College Football Playoff semifinal odds at [@primesportsbook](https://nitter.net/primesportsbook "Prime Sportsbook"):

recipe.line1Job: Name the game/slate + promise sharp vs public split
recipe.proofBlock: Side-by-side: public % vs sharp $, line move, or "notable sharp action" bullets
recipe.closeJob: One verdict line — which side the market is wrong about
exemplarLines: Where the sharps/public are and more on Miami vs. Ole Miss College Football Playoff semifinal odds at [@primesportsbook](https://nitter.net/primesportsbook "Prime Sportsbook"):
Sharp Action
Ole Miss +3.5
"65% of public handle is laying \[points\] with Miami. However, 68% of professional money is backing Ole Miss.
"We have 3X the handle on Miami moneyline bets over Ole Miss moneyline bets. But Pros are still seeing value in the 'dog.
"Both Pros and Joes favor the Over."
MLB Recap:
Shane Bieber Under 6.5 Strikeouts✅
Guardians Moneyline❌
Nationals Moneyline❌

gaps.niche: AlexCaruso recaps name misses and still get engagement
gaps.fix: Never post win-only recaps; lead with the miss + lesson

gaps.niche: Viral niche posts have a quotable market-read line
gaps.fix: First line must work as a standalone screenshot (market read, not pick list)

recommendedExperiments.test: Post 3x pick_with_proof this week using the same hook → proof → close order as post 2070888202299174981

agentInstructions: Open with diagnosis field — do not invent a new thesis.
ALL performance numbers from labeledEngagement only (n=5).
Use formatMatchups + rewriteCandidates for before/after coaching.
Teach structure from nicheBenchmark.structureRecipes — line 1 / proof / close.
Skip growthPlaybook section entirely if topTips is empty.
Output exactly 3 post blueprints for the next slate — not generic templates.
ONE experiment only — pick highest priority from recommendedExperiments.
Ban: "add repost ask", "use more emoji", "post threads" unless tied to a specific peer exemplar + post ID.
